opinion.h4: VALENZUELA v. EYMAN, WARDEN, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ARIZONA. No. 1144, Misc. Decided June 18, 1962.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
370 U.S. 290 PATSKAN v. BUCHKOE, WARDEN, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SIXTH CIRCUIT. No. 1262, Misc. Decided June 18, 1962.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
